data.title: Options markets are predicting 30%+ swings for 10 stocks reporting earnings this week, including Capitol Federal Financial and Beacon Financial Corp. Earnings per share for Beacon Financial Corp are expected to be 79 cents with revenue of $224.81 million, while ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc is expected to report 73 cents in earnings per share. Market analysis available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Options markets are showing heightened post-earnings volatility for a group of stocks due to report this week, with the Federal Reserve's policy decision on Wednesday adding to potential price swings. Capitol Federal Financial stock is at elevated levels. Benzinga Pro reports that options markets are indicating double-digit to near-50% post-earnings swings in regional banks. 10 stocks have implied moves of around 30% or more before their earnings reports. Beacon Financial Corp. will report Q4 results on Jan. 28 with an expected EPS of 79 cents and revenue of $224.81 million, implying a 29.48% post-earnings move. ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. will report Q4 earnings on Jan. 29 with an estimated 73 cents EPS. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
IDF Spokesperson: The IDF recently attacked two terrorists from the Hezbollah terrorist organization in the Nabatieh area in southern Lebanon.

data.title: Chrome Horse Society chosen as Official Tequila of 2026 Winter Equestrian Festival, launching signature cocktail Show Pony.
data.description: The 2026 Winter Equestrian Festival (WEF) in Wellington, Florida, announced Chrome Horse Society as its Official Tequila. This collaboration introduces the event's inaugural signature cocktail, the Show Pony. This partnership signifies a significant moment for WEF.

data.title: On Jan 24, 2026, Outward Bound USA's first Reset Day had record-breaking 280,000+ offline hours pledged nationwide.
data.description: In Boulder, Colorado, Outward Bound USA announced the success of The Reset on January 24, 2026, a national event encouraging individuals to disconnect from screens and engage with the outdoors. The inaugural Reset Day saw an impressive turnout, marking the largest collective display of off-screen activity in a single day. Over 280,000 hours were pledged towards this initiative, with over 19,000 participants involved in the nationwide effort.

data.title: Bitcoin is the only crypto worth holding long term, says analyst Trader Mayne, warning 99% of altcoins transfer wealth from retail investors. Only 0.4% wallets succeed in Pump.fun lottery.
data.description: Experienced cryptocurrency analyst Trader Mayne asserts that Bitcoin is the sole digital asset worth holding for the long haul, cautioning that about 99% of alternative cryptocurrencies are designed to facilitate the transfer of wealth from regular investors to insiders. Mayne explains that regardless of being classified as blue chips or meme coins, the majority are fundamentally programmed to decrease in value compared to Bitcoin in the long run. Mayne also shed light on the abysmal success rate of the 'Pump.fun' Lottery, emphasizing the current unfavorable odds in the meme coin trend. Specifically, data reveals a staggering 99.6% failure rate within the Solana-based launchpad Pump.fun, showcasing that only 0.4% of wallets have... For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: International Roofing Expo sets new standards with largest-ever edition, featuring 700+ exhibitors and strong international presence.
data.description: The recent edition of the International Roofing Expo turned out to be the largest ever, boasting more than 700 exhibitors and significant international participation.

data.title: Duke Energy restores power to 131,000 after Winter Storm Fern; offers energy management tips as cold weather continues.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on January 26, 2026, Duke Energy teams are working on fixing broken equipment and getting electricity back to customers throughout the Carolinas following Winter Storm Fern. The company is providing tips for customers with power on how to conserve energy during the lingering cold weather.

data.title: Orange 142 wins 2 MarCom Awards for digital campaign with measurable impact, a division of Direct Digital Holdings.
data.description: A recent campaign has shown significant results in both paid search and organic social media. Orange 142, a division of Direct Digital Holdings (Nasdaq: DRCT) based in Austin, Texas, successfully demonstrated measurable impact. The campaign, targeted towards mid-market brands and agencies, effectively utilized digital marketing strategies. The results of the campaign are evident in the numbers, showcasing the success of Orange 142 in the digital marketing realm.
Brent crude futures settle at $65.59/bbl, down 29 cents, 0.44%.

data.title: "Washington Post will now send a small team of reporters to cover Olympics, after previously deciding not to."
data.description: After informing sports journalists on Friday, the newspaper decided to send a limited team of reporters to cover the Olympics instead of sending a group.

data.title: Poo~Pourri reveals first-ever Scent of the Year, offering two premium scents for a fresh start in 2026.
data.description: Today, in Dallas, on January 26, 2026, a new line of high-end fragrances has been introduced to assist in moving on from the chaos of the previous year and embracing a renewed sense of confidence. Dubbed ~Pourri, a creation from the same creators of the popular Poo~Pourri bathroom spray, these scents aim to encapsulate rejuvenation and positivity. The announcement details the launch of these scents and showcases the brand's commitment to bringing innovation to the market.

data.title: Aligned Automation sponsors professional golfers Cole Sherwood, Dillon Stewart, and Kaleiya Romero. Announcement made on 26-Jan-2026.
data.description: Aligned Automation has revealed their sponsorship of professional golfers Cole Sherwood, Dillon Stewart, and Kaleiya Romero in a recent announcement. The partnership was officially announced on 26-Jan-2026. The company has made adjustments to the original news release, indicating their support for these athletes.
SKY NETWORK TELEVISION AND PARAMOUNT GLOBAL CONTENT DISTRIBUTION ANNOUNCE EXCLUSIVE PARTNERSHIP

data.title: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) declares $0.12 quarterly cash dividend, payable on March 13, 2026 to shareholders of record on Feb 13.
data.description: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) from North Reading, Mass., disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share. The dividend will be paid out on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. Specializing in automated test equipment and advanced robotics systems, Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) helps customers meet quality standards in semiconductor and electronics production.

data.title: Celebrities and winners gather at 10th Pegasus World Cup; $3M to Skippylongstocking, $1M to Test Score, $500k to Destino D'Oro.
data.description: Empire of The Sun and Two Friends delivered headline performances at Skippylongstocking's victory at the $3 million Pegasus World Cup Invitational. Test Score also triumphed, winning the $1 million Pegasus World Cup Turf Invitational, while Destino D'Oro took home $500,000 in the Pegasus World Cup Filly & Mare Turf Invitational. The event witnessed record-breaking moments throughout.

data.title: Catalyze secures 100 MW solar tax equity financing with RBC for 18 community and C&I projects across NY, IL, CA & VA.
data.description: In Houston, Catalyze has successfully secured 100 megawatts of solar tax equity with RBC. This funding will support 18 projects in community and commercial/industrial sectors across New York, Illinois, California, and Virginia. The projects are expected to be completed between 2026 and 2027.
